title: Wireless Media Resources
subtitle: Optimizing Voice, Video and Real-Time Applications

items.title: Quality of Service (QoS)
items.desc: Prioritizes critical applications such as voice and video traffic.

items.title: Voice over Wi-Fi
items.desc: Supports wireless voice communications with low latency and packet loss.

items.title: Video Optimization
items.desc: Enhances streaming and conferencing performance over WLANs.

items.title: Traffic Classification
items.desc: Identifies and prioritizes application traffic types automatically.

items.title: Bandwidth Management
items.desc: Allocates wireless resources efficiently for real-time services.
